_comment: Pool of EtsyCarousel sources for CarouselReplay TikTok videos. To add: copy 5 square slides to public/ec0X/, add entry here. Each entry must include 'metadata' block — used to auto-generate POST_METADATA.txt next to the rendered video.

metadata.shortHook: 73% of print buyers want 4:5 — most shops only list 2:3.
metadata.outcomeStatement: Same artwork. Wrong proportions for the frame they already own.
metadata.openQuestion: What size do YOU list first → 2:3 or 4:5?
metadata.youtubeTitle: Why Etsy print buyers ignore your listings — the 4:5 mistake
metadata.youtubeDescription:
73% of Etsy print buyers search for 4:5 ratios — but most shops only list 2:3. Same artwork, wrong proportions for the frames buyers already own.

This 15-second breakdown shows the data, the fix, and how to generate every standard ratio from a single upload in under a minute.
metadata.pinterestTitle: Etsy Print Sizes Mistake — Why You're Losing 73% of Buyers
metadata.pinterestDescription: Most Etsy shops list 2:3 ratio prints. But 73% of print buyers actually want 4:5 sizes (8x10, 11x14, 16x20). Same artwork, wrong proportions for the frames they already own. Fix it free with SnapToSize → one upload, every ratio auto-resized.
metadata.offerDescription: 30 days Pro on snaptosize.com (50 codes total)

carousels.hookCaption:
She Tried to Frame It.
Left 1 Star.

metadata.videoTitle: She Bought the Print. Tried to Frame It. Left 1 Star.
metadata.shortHook: She loved the print. The frame didn't fit. You got a 1-star review.
metadata.outcomeStatement: Her frame was 4:5. Your file was 2:3. Different proportions. The print didn't fit.
metadata.openQuestion: Have you ever had a buyer complain about sizing — or just silently leave?
metadata.youtubeTitle: The 1-star Etsy review nobody warns you about (wrong frame size)
metadata.youtubeDescription:
Your buyer ordered a print. Downloaded it. Took it to the frame store. It didn't fit. She left 1 star — not because the art was bad, but because the proportions were wrong.

Standard frames come in 12 sizes. Most Etsy listings cover 3 or fewer. Here's how to fix it in one upload.
metadata.pinterestTitle: The Silent 1-Star Review Etsy Print Sellers Don't See Coming
metadata.pinterestDescription: Her frame was 4:5. Your file was 2:3. The print didn't fit. She left 1 star and never came back. Standard frames come in 12 sizes — most Etsy listings cover 3 or fewer. Fix it with SnapToSize: one upload, every ratio covered.
